CP3 Legacy — All Pages Built

Next.js App Router | 7 routes | JSON data files | Alchemists template structure

All pages built from JSON data in src/data/ | Navigation: Home, Player (Overview/Stats/Bio/Gallery), News

Homepage

/

The main landing page with hero, featured carousel, and main content.

Player Overview

/player/overview

Chris Paul player info, career averages, last 5 games, related news.

Player Stats

/player/stats

Full career statistics — totals, averages, highs, rankings, 20-season table.

Player Bio

/player/bio

Complete biography — early life, college, NBA career, achievements.

Player Gallery

/player/gallery

Photo gallery with category filter — 12 photos across 5 categories.

News Listing

/news

All news/blog posts — featured post + 3 post cards.

Blog Post Detail

/news/[slug]

Single blog post — full article with body content, tags, sidebar.
